records.question: Which restaurants have a rating of 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
WHERE restaurant.rating = 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT ResID FROM Restaurant WHERE Rating = 3

records.question: Which restaurants have a rating of at least 4 where exactly 13.2 was spent during a visit on or after 2017-10-08 13:00:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
WHERE visits_restaurant.spent = 13.2 AND visits_restaurant.time >= '2017-10-08 13:00:30' AND restaurant.rating >= 4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Visits_Restaurant v ON r.ResID = v.ResID
WHERE r.Rating >= 4
  AND v.Spent = 13.2
  AND v.Time >= '2017-10-08 13:00:30'

records.question: Which Subway restaurants have female students who spent exactly 6.53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.sex = 'F' AND restaurant.resname = 'Subway' AND visits_restaurant.spent = 6.53
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Visits_Restaurant vr ON r.ResID = vr.ResID
JOIN Student s ON vr.StuID = s.StuID
WHERE r.ResName = 'Subway' 
  AND s.Sex = 'F' 
  AND vr.Spent = 6.53

records.question: Which restaurants named Honeygrow were visited on 2017-10-08 at 13:00:30 by Eric from city_code ATL, aged at most 20, advised by 8772, who spent at least 13.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE visits_restaurant.spent >= 13.2 AND visits_restaurant.time = '2017-10-08 13:00:30' AND student.city_code = 'ATL' AND student.age <= 20 AND student.advisor = 8772 AND restaurant.resname = 'Honeygrow' AND student.fname = 'Eric'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Visits_Restaurant vr ON r.ResID = vr.ResID
JOIN Student s ON vr.StuID = s.StuID
WHERE r.ResName = 'Honeygrow'
  AND vr.Time = '2017-10-08 13:00:30'
  AND s.Fname = 'Eric'
  AND s.city_code = 'ATL'
  AND s.Age <= 20
  AND s.Advisor = 8772
  AND vr.Spent >= 13.2

records.question: Which Subway restaurants have a rating of at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN type_of_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = type_of_restaurant.resid
WHERE restaurant.rating <= 3 AND restaurant.resname = 'Subway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ResID
FROM Restaurant
WHERE ResName = 'Subway' AND Rating <= 3

records.question: Which restaurants have been visited by students whose advisor number is at least 1121 and whose major number is at least 600?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT restaurant.resid FROM restaurant
JOIN visits_restaurant ON restaurant.resid = visits_restaurant.resid
JOIN student ON visits_restaurant.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.advisor >= 1121 AND student.major >= 600
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.ResID
FROM Restaurant r
JOIN Visits_Restaurant vr ON r.ResID = vr.ResID
JOIN Student s ON vr.StuID = s.StuID
WHERE s.Advisor >= 1121 AND s.Major >= 600
